settings.choice_undo_description: When enabled, undo on cards or potions with choices returns to the choice screen; when disabled, undo defaults to before the card or potion was played.
settings.unified_effect_description: Prefer the current generic instant-effect synthesis path; disable it to fall back to the more conservative choice restore path.
settings.hud2_description: Enable a second HUD style inspired by Slay the Spire 2's dark stone-and-brass combat UI.
